mapper.sql: user_id AS userId, username AS username, password AS password, email AS email, registration_date AS registrationDate, last_login_date AS lastLoginDate, is_active AS isActive, summary_credits AS summaryCredits, insert_time AS insertTime, update_time AS updateTime
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO users (username, password, email, registration_date) VALUES (#{username}, #{password}, #{email}, NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE users SET last_login_date = NOW(), update_time = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId}
UPDATE users SET summary_credits = summary_credits - 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND summary_credits > 0
UPDATE users SET summary_credits = summary_credits + 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId}
UPDATE users SET summary_credits = summary_credits + #{delta}, update_time = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT FROM users WHERE email = #{email} AND is_active = 1 LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE users SET password = #{password}, update_time = NOW() WHERE email = #{email} AND is_active = 1
